history.note: B done; dispatching C (Metal kernels b67f5db5c+57c4283b5+2f2d44052)

Cherry-picked b67f5db5c (Metal HC decode optimization) and 2f2d44052 (V4 prompt replay speed-up); skipped 57c4283b5 (empty after upstream cleanup). Bumped GGML_OP_COUNT static_assert from 101 to 102 (cherry-pick was relative to base 100; we already had LIGHTNING_INDEXER op so antirez's WEIGHTED_SUM puts us at 102). Migrated gate-speed.sh from llama-cli to llama-completion (same pattern Task B applied to gate-coherence.sh). Build: PASS. Coherence (Metal NGL=999): PASS gen='Paris. The capital of Italy is Rome...'. Coherence (CPU NGL=0): PASS (no regression). Speed (Metal): PASS at 25.91 tok/s — exceeds antirez's 21.1 tok/s on M3 Max.
